channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Ordinary Seaman position is available on an Offshore Supply Vessel currently in standby mode. Experience on passenger/MBC vessels and main fleet is acceptable. This is a back-to-back contract.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ordinary Seaman Job - Offshore Supply Vessel at RAVI SHARMA

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

A Bosun position is available on a Car Carrier vessel for worldwide trading. Key requirements and further details about the role can be found via the provided link. This opportunity is based with the team in the Philippines.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Bosun Job on Car Carrier Vessel at OSM Thome Jobs at Sea

item.description:
Location: Aberdeen Harbour
Description:

Experienced Deckhand required for an oil/fuel bunker barge operating within Aberdeen Harbour. The role involves assisting with bunkering operations, mooring, and routine deck maintenance. This position offers a contract of approximately 6 months with potential for extension, a working pattern of Monday-Friday, and a daily rate of £200, with overtime paid. Immediate start is available. Valid ML5 Medical or ENG1 and STCW certification are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on Bunker Barge in Aberdeen at Elite Consult Group Ltd

item.description:
Location: United States and overseas
Description:

A Boatswain's Mate is required for duties on surface ships, involving seamanship and deck operations. Responsibilities include standing watch, operating small boats, maintaining equipment, and participating in cargo handling and security. This role offers hands-on, outdoor work in varied conditions with opportunities for advancement. Assignments are on surface ships and shore installations in the United States and overseas.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boatswain's Mate Job on Surface Ships at Madison Jobs, Wisconsin

item.description:
Location: United States and overseas
Description:

A Boatswain's Mate position is available for service on surface ships, involving seamanship and deck operations. Responsibilities include standing watch, operating small boats, maintaining deck equipment, and supporting cargo handling and security operations. This role requires hands-on work in varied conditions and offers opportunities for advancement within the deck department.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boatswain's Mate Job on Surface Ships at Salt Lake City jobs

item.description:
Location: United States and overseas
Description:

A Boatswain's Mate is sought for a position involving seamanship and deck operations. Responsibilities include standing watch, operating small boats, maintaining deck equipment, and supporting cargo handling. The role requires hands-on, outdoor work in varied conditions, often involving watches day and night. Assignments are on surface ships and shore installations in the United States and overseas. This is a physically demanding maritime environment requiring close teamwork and adherence to safety procedures.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boatswain's Mate Job on Navy Ship at Bay Area Jobs

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Ordinary Seaman is needed for a General Cargo vessel of 3,000 GRT. The position offers a salary of USD 400 plus overtime. Any valid seaman's book is accepted, and candidates ready to join within one week are preferred. The vessel is currently seeking to fill this urgent vacancy.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ordinary Seaman Job - General Cargo Vessel at SEASPEED MARINE SERVICES LLP

item.description:
Location: United States of America (USA)
Description:

A Boatswain's Mate is sought for deck operations on a Navy ship. Responsibilities include standing watch, operating small boats, maintaining deck equipment, and participating in cargo handling and security operations. This role involves hands-on, outdoor work in varied conditions and requires teamwork and leadership potential. Assignments may be on surface ships or shore installations in the United States and overseas.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boatswain's Mate Job on Navy Ship at Raleigh jobs

item.description:
Location: United States and overseas
Description:

A Boatswain's Mate position is available for service on surface ships, involving expertise in seamanship and deck operations. Responsibilities include standing watch, operating small boats, maintaining deck equipment, and participating in cargo handling and security. This role requires hands-on work in varied conditions and offers opportunities for advancement within the deck department.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boatswain's Mate Job on Surface Ships at Huntsville jobs

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Able Seaman is sought for a Reefer vessel with 3543 DWT. The position offers a contract duration of 3 months and a monthly salary of $2560. Joining is scheduled for July 9, 2026. Key requirements include experience as an Able Seaman on similar vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman is sought for a Reefer vessel with 3543 DWT at Crewing agency "Saga"
